properties.name: Mama Shelter Prague (Meeting Venue)
properties.theme: RTCM SC 104 & SC 134 meetings, 19–21 May 2026
properties.description: Veletržní 1502/20, Prague 7 – Holešovice.

properties.name: EUSPA – EU Agency for the Space Programme
properties.theme: Galileo, EGNOS, Copernicus, GOVSATCOM, IRIS², EU SST
properties.description: Janovského 438/2, Prague 7. ~10 min walk from the meeting venue.

properties.name: National Technical Museum
properties.theme: Kepler instruments, Bürgi sextants, Habermel astrolabes, timekeeping, transport
properties.description: Kostelní 1320/42, Prague 7. Tue–Sun 9–6, ~330 CZK.

properties.name: Letná Park
properties.theme: Timekeeping – Prague's pre-radio noon signal (1891–1920s)
properties.description: Panoramic views. Beer garden under chestnut trees.

properties.name: Stromovka Park
properties.theme: Morning run — Prague's largest central park, former royal game preserve
properties.description: Královská obora, Prague 7. Flat paths, mature trees, ~5 min from hotel.

properties.name: Prague Planetarium
properties.theme: First LED planetarium in Europe, 23.5-metre dome
properties.description: Královská obora 233, Prague 7. Shows in Czech and English. Book well in advance.

properties.name: Prague Astronomical Clock (Orloj)
properties.theme: Celestial computation, timekeeping since 1410
properties.description: Old Town Hall, Staroměstské nám. 1. Tower open daily from 9 AM, ~450 CZK.

properties.name: Prague Meridian
properties.theme: Solar time determination, reference meridian
properties.description: Brass strip in Old Town Square pavement. Free, always accessible.

properties.name: Týn Church – Tycho Brahe's Tomb
properties.theme: Tycho Brahe – observational astronomy, planetary position data
properties.description: Church of Our Lady before Týn. Tue–Sat ~10–1, 3–5. Free admission.

properties.name: Berta Fanta's Salon (U Kamenného stolu)
properties.theme: Einstein's Prague social circle, relativity discussions
properties.description: Staroměstské nám. 551/17. Plaque only.

properties.name: Ernst Mach Memorial Plaque (EPS Historic Site)
properties.theme: Mach's critique of Newtonian mechanics, influence on Einstein
properties.description: Ovocný trh 562/7. Bronze bust and trilingual plaque (2016).

properties.name: The Karolinum – Doppler's 1842 presentation
properties.theme: Doppler effect – announced here on 25 May 1842
properties.description: Ovocný trh 3. Gothic oriel window.

properties.name: Klementinum – Astronomical Tower and Baroque Library
properties.theme: Noon determination, meridian observations, meteorological record since 1775
properties.description: Karlova 190/1. Guided tours ~50 min, ~404 CZK. Book ahead.

properties.name: Kepler's House – Karlova 4
properties.theme: Kepler's 1st and 2nd laws derived here (1607–1612)
properties.description: Karlova 188/4. Bronze plaque and courtyard fountain.

properties.name: Charles Bridge
properties.theme: Astrological founding (9 July 1357, 5:31 AM)
properties.description: Founded on the palindrome 1-3-5-7-9-7-5-3-1. Free, always open.

properties.name: Prague Castle
properties.theme: Rudolf II's court – centre of European astronomy 1583–1612
properties.description: Castle grounds free; daily 6 AM – 10 PM.

properties.name: Queen Anne's Summer Palace (Belvedere)
properties.theme: Rudolf II's astronomical observatory
properties.description: Royal Garden, north of Prague Castle. Garden free, daily 10–7 Apr–Oct.

properties.name: Nový Svět 1 – Tycho Brahe's First Prague Home
properties.theme: Tycho Brahe's residence upon arrival in Prague (1600)
properties.description: Nový Svět 76/1. 1901 plaque. Now Aparthotel Tycho de Brahe.

properties.name: Brahe–Kepler Monument, Pohořelec
properties.theme: The collaboration that produced orbital mechanics
properties.description: Bronze statue by Josef Vajce (1984). Free, 24/7.

properties.name: Strahov Monastery Library
properties.theme: Historic astronomical texts, celestial globes, star atlases
properties.description: Strahovské nádvoří. Daily 9–5, ~190 CZK.

properties.name: Štefánik Observatory, Petřín Hill
properties.theme: Public astronomy, named for astronomer M.R. Štefánik
properties.description: Strahovská 205. Tue–Sun, ~100 CZK.

properties.name: Café Louvre – Einstein's regular café
properties.theme: Einstein met Pick and Heinrich here to discuss gravity and light
properties.description: Národní 1987/22 (1st floor). Mon–Fri 8 AM – 11:30 PM, Sat–Sun from 9 AM.

properties.name: Café Imperial – Stunning Art Deco interior
properties.theme: Celebratory dining
properties.description: Na Poříčí 1072/15.

properties.name: Doppler Plaque – Karlovo náměstí
properties.theme: Doppler's Prague residence and the former Polytechnic
properties.description: Karlovo nám. 6/20. White marble plaque (1903).

properties.name: Doppler's Family Home – U Obecního Dvora 7
properties.theme: Where Doppler lived 1843–1847
properties.description: U Obecního Dvora 7/799, Prague 1. Bronze plaque (2006).

properties.name: Viničná 7 – Mach's and Einstein's Physics Institute
properties.theme: Mach 1879–1895; Einstein 1911–1912. General relativity work.
properties.description: Viničná 1594/7, Prague 2. Active university building.

properties.name: Einstein's Apartment – Lesnická 7, Smíchov
properties.theme: Einstein's Prague residence 1911–1912
properties.description: Lesnická 1215/7, Prague 5. Plaque with bronze head (1979).

properties.name: U Zlatého Tygra (The Golden Tiger)
properties.theme: Refreshment – real locals' pick
properties.description: Husova 228/17. Unpasteurised Pilsner Urquell. Opens daily at 3 PM.
